task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens and reads the imaging plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Documents/m82_imaging_plan.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the telescope is slewed to the target M82.
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars sky map showing the telescope crosshairs centered on M82, or the Ekos Mount module showing the telescope tracking M82.

task_completion.description: Verify the Ekos Capture sequence is configured with the correct filters, binning, and frame counts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos Capture module showing a sequence queue with L (1x1 binning), R, G, B, and Ha (2x2 binning) filters, with a count of at least 5 frames for each.

task_completion.description: Verify the sky view image of M82 is captured and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image viewer displaying the captured sky view of M82, or a file manager showing 'm82_sky_view.png' in '/home/ga/Images/m82_superwind'.

task_completion.description: Verify the observation log is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing the observation log 'm82_observation_log.txt' with details of the imaging session.

task_completion.description: Verify the FITS files are saved in the appropriate subdirectories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal showing FITS files saved in '/home/ga/Images/m82_superwind' or its respective filter subdirectories.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI to perform the observation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show active interaction with the KStars and Ekos interfaces, rather than terminal scripts mocking FITS file creation.

integrity.description: Verify the sky view image is genuinely captured from the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sky view image should look like a KStars sky map export or Ekos FITS viewer screenshot, not a generic photo of M82 downloaded from a web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the observation log is not just a copy-paste of the imaging plan.
integrity.visual_evidence: The observation log should contain session-specific details or formatting indicating it was written after or during the observation, rather than being an exact duplicate of the imaging plan text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: M82 (RA 9.9311, Dec 69.6797). Filters: L (slot 1, 1x1 binning), G (slot 2, 2x2 binning), B (slot 3, 2x2 binning), R (slot 4, 2x2 binning), Ha (slot 5, 2x2 binning). Minimum FITS files per filter: 5. Output directory: /home/ga/Images/m82_superwind. Sky view image path: /home/ga/Images/m82_superwind/m82_sky_view.png. Observation log path: /home/ga/Documents/m82_observation_log.txt.
